message: Three near-identical 'corrupt JSON' tests (test_load_raises_on_corrupt_json, test_update_raises_on_corrupt_json, test_remove_raises_on_corrupt_json) differ only in the file_status function called. Could be a single pytest.mark.parametrize over the three operations. Minor — current form is readable; flagging only as a tidy-up if the file grows further variants.
rationale: The finding itself acknowledges the current form is readable and only flags this as a speculative tidy-up if more variants are added. Explicit tests are arguably clearer than a parametrize, and there are only three. Below threshold for action.
